CAREERS AT WM

Hiring Today, 
For Tomorrow®

At WM, we are Always Working For A Sustainable Tomorrow® We care about the future for you, your family, our communities, and our environment. Are you ready to start your tomorrow, today? Apply to join us in our mission toward creating a more sustainable tomorrow. 

Find Jobs
      • All Jobs (1564)
      • New Jobs (833)
      • Drivers (366)
      • Technicians (295)
      • India Business Services (258)
      • Operators (133)
      • Drivers - Non CDL (68)

      Attention Candidates:  Legitimate WM Careers are posted on WM Careers and any contact will be made from an @wm.com email address.  WM does not charge a fee at any stage of the recruitment process.  If you are contacted regarding a WM job that does not appear on WM Careers, if the contact does not come from an @wm.com address, or you are asked to pay any fees, the contact is not legitimate and you should not respond.  Candidates must be at least 18 years of age for employment with WM.

      WM Privacy Policy effective Sep 20, 2024. California Privacy Notice  WM Privacy Policy effective June 12, 2025. Review Policy

      "I have been with the company now for 17 years... This place has made it so that I can afford things that no one else in my family has been able to do... so I do it for my kids."

      -Deon, WM Driver

      Follow us on Social

      E-Verify

      Here at WM, we comply with federal law by verifying employment eligibility

      Did You Know

      Federal law protects you against discrimination in the workplace

      Equal Employment Opportunity

      For United States: WM is an equal opportunity employer.  All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, status as a protected veteran or any other characteristic protected under applicable federal, state, or local law.  

      For Canada: WM is committed to the principle of equal employment for all applicants and employees, without discrimination on the basis of all grounds protected by applicable human rights legislation. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process. Please notify us if you require accommodation.

      Request a Reasonable Accommodation

      If, because of a medical condition or disability, you need a reasonable accommodation during the employment process, email: careers@wm.com with the nature of your request.

      New York State Article 23-A.

      New York Correctional Law: Licensure and employment of persons previously convicted of criminal offenses. 

      WM Operations

      WM operates in United States, Canada, and India

      Are You Still With Us?

      It seems you've been gone for a while. For security reasons we will end your session automatically in 03:00 unless you would like to continue working.
